description: Bounded meta-knobs the capability reviewer may auto-tune (never weakens pre-trade gate or immutable caps).

winning_pattern_share_target.notes: Phase-1 realistic target when portfolio patterns are net negative.

edge_autofix_rr_boost_cap.notes: Caps session RR margin boost from edge autofix.

edge_autofix_min_exits.notes: Minimum exits before edge autofix fires (reduce noise on quiet days).

rth_review_cadence_mult.notes: Multiplier on RTH SI interval when objectives off-track (<1 = more frequent).

session_si_critical_expectancy_usd.notes: Session expectancy threshold for critical mode (more negative = less aggressive).
